label: Accident & Emergency Services
title: Accident & Emergency Services
seoTitle: Accident Emergency Services hospitals in India
description: Patients who are critically injured by life-threatening happenings& fatal poisoning are immediately rushed under the care who are revived, stabilized &managed as per the protocols.

sections.heading: Accident Emergency Services
paragraphs: When every second counts, Adhiparasakthi Hospitals, Melmaruvathur is your trusted partner for comprehensive Accident Emergency Services. Our dedicated team is equipped with advanced technology and expertise to provide immediate and effective care for a range of emergency situations.

sections.heading: Why Choose Our Accident Emergency Services?
paragraphs: 24/7 Emergency Care: Our emergency department operates around the clock, ensuring rapid response and treatment whenever you need it.
Expert Medical Team: Our skilled professionals include trauma surgeons, emergency physicians, and specialized nurses trained to handle critical situations with precision.
Advanced Technology: We utilize cutting-edge diagnostic tools and life-saving equipment to deliver the best possible care during emergencies.
Comprehensive Services: From initial assessment to emergency surgery and critical care, we offer a full spectrum of services to address various types of accidents.
Rapid Triage System: Our efficient triage system ensures that the most critical cases receive immediate attention, minimizing wait times and optimizing patient outcomes.
On-site Diagnostic Facilities: Immediate access to X-rays, CT scans, and other diagnostic services allows for quick and accurate diagnosis.
Integrated Care Approach: Our emergency services are seamlessly integrated with other hospital departments, ensuring continuity of care and comprehensive treatment plans.
Family Support Services: We provide counseling and support to families during stressful situations, keeping them informed and involved in the care process.

sections.heading: Scope of Services
paragraphs: Trauma Care: Treatment for injuries resulting from accidents, including fractures, internal injuries, and head trauma.
Emergency Surgery: Immediate surgical intervention for life-threatening conditions and severe injuries.
Critical Care: Advanced monitoring and support for patients in critical condition, including those requiring intensive care.
Wound Management: Professional care for cuts, lacerations, and other wounds to prevent complications and promote healing.
Orthopedic Services: Specialized care for bone and joint injuries, including emergency orthopedic surgery.
Neuroemergency Care: Assessment and management of neurological emergencies such as strokes and head injuries.

At Adhiparasakthi Hospitals, we are committed to delivering exceptional care during the most critical moments. Our Accident Emergency Services are designed to provide swift, effective, and compassionate treatment to every patient. For emergencies, trust us to be there when you need us the most.
Contact Us: For immediate assistance, call 9499059966 or visit our emergency department at [Hospital Address].

label: Central Laboratory

sections.heading: Central Laboratory at Adhiparasakthi Hospitals, Melmaruvathur
paragraphs: Welcome to the Central Laboratory at Adhiparasakthi Hospitals, your hub for accurate and timely diagnostic testing. Our state-of-the-art laboratory is equipped with the latest technology to provide comprehensive diagnostic services essential for effective treatment and patient care.

sections.heading: Why Choose Our Central Laboratory?
paragraphs: Advanced Technology: We utilize cutting-edge diagnostic equipment to ensure precise and reliable results.
Wide Range of Tests: From routine blood tests to specialized assays, we offer a complete suite of diagnostic services.
Rapid Turnaround: Our efficient processes guarantee quick results, helping your healthcare team make timely decisions.
Expert Team: Our skilled laboratory technicians and pathologists are dedicated to delivering high-quality diagnostic support.
Quality Assurance: We adhere to stringent quality control protocols to maintain the highest standards of accuracy and reliability.
Patient-Centric Care: We prioritize patient comfort and confidentiality throughout the diagnostic process.

sections.heading: Our Scope of Services
paragraphs: Hematology: Comprehensive blood tests including CBC, coagulation studies, and more.
Clinical Chemistry: Biochemical analyses for metabolic, renal, and liver function.
Microbiology: Culture and sensitivity tests for infection diagnosis.
Immunology: Tests for autoimmune disorders and immunological assessments.
Serology: Screening for viral, bacterial, and other infections.
Endocrinology: Hormone assays for thyroid, adrenal, and other endocrine functions.
Toxicology: Analysis for drugs, toxins, and substance abuse.

sections.heading: Must-Know Information
paragraphs: Accredited Laboratory: Our laboratory is accredited by national and international standards.
Integrated Services: Seamlessly integrated with our hospital’s departments for comprehensive care.
Emergency Testing: Fast-track testing services available for urgent medical situations.
Patient Portal: Access your test results online through our secure patient portal.
Insurance & Billing: We accept a wide range of insurance plans and offer transparent billing.
Experience exceptional diagnostic services at Adhiparasakthi Hospitals' Central Laboratory—where precision meets compassion. For more information or to schedule a test, contact us today!

label: Cardiovascular & Thoracic Surgery
title: Cardiovascular & Thoracic Surgery
seoTitle: Cardiovascular & Thoracic surgery hospitals in India
description: MAPIMS is a Super speciality Tertiary care hospital with a highly experienced, qualified, and dedicated team of heart surgeons, cardiologists, and radiologists

sections.heading: Cardiovascular & Thoracic Surgery
paragraphs: At Adhiparasakthi Hospitals, Melmaruvathur, our Cardiovascular & Thoracic Surgery department is dedicated to providing cutting-edge surgical care for a range of complex heart and lung conditions. With a team of highly skilled surgeons and state-of-the-art technology, we ensure precise diagnoses and effective treatments tailored to your needs.

sections.heading: Our Expertise Includes:
paragraphs: Coronary Artery Bypass Grafting (CABG): Restores blood flow to the heart by bypassing blocked arteries.
Heart Valve Repair and Replacement: Addresses issues with valve function to improve heart efficiency.
Aortic Aneurysm Repair: Corrects weakened sections of the aorta to prevent rupture.
Minimally Invasive Cardiac Surgery: Utilizes advanced techniques for quicker recovery and less scarring.
Endovenous Laser Therapy (EVLT): Treats varicose veins with minimal discomfort.
Thoracic Tumor Resection: Removes tumors from the lungs or chest cavity with precision.
Lung Volume Reduction Surgery: Enhances breathing in patients with emphysema.
Esophageal Surgery: Addresses conditions affecting the esophagus, including cancer and strictures.
Pectus Excavatum Repair: Corrects the deformity of the chest wall for improved function and appearance.

Our comprehensive approach combines expert care with innovative techniques to ensure the best outcomes. Trust Adhiparasakthi Hospitals for your cardiovascular and thoracic health, where advanced care meets compassionate service.

label: General Surgery
title: General Surgery
seoTitle: Best Hospitals for complex general surgery in chennai
description: General medicine is the very basic requirement of any healthcare organization and its practitioners promote general disease prevention methods and champion a healthy society.

sections.heading: The practice of managing, preventing, treating and diagnosing all adult health conditions is termed as General Medicine. As the first point of contact, often general medicine department facilitates to direct patients to specialists if a medical condition needs advanced treatment or wherever required. Employing advanced diagnostic methods the severity and/or cause of a condition is ascertained before an individual can be referred to a specialist, if required. General medicine is the very basic requirement of any healthcare organization and its practitioners promote general disease prevention methods and champion a healthy society. The Department of General Medicine at MAPIMS, Chennai offers a multi-disciplinary approach to provide a holistic and comprehensive management of diseases. The well-equipped labs and well-appointed wards with compassionate clinical personnel ensures that the patients receive the best healing atmosphere. The strong inter-professional team promotes a collaborative approach to problem-solving. The quality improvement team is finding new ways to provide best care to the patients for a healthy life. The range of diseases managed by the Department includes – general sickness to the management of chronic and complex diseases. Some of the services rendered at the Department are given as below: Primary care, including routine check-ups Diabetes management Mental health assessment Education programs Blood pressure and related conditions Stomach pain, vomiting, diarrhoea and jaundice Respiratory diseases like asthma, allergies, lung infection, cough, sinusitis, tuberculosis, and pneumonia

label: Interventional Radiology
title: Interventional Radiology
description: Interventional Radiology at MAPIMS offers a full range of diagnostic services and therapies for the patients.

sections.heading: Interventional Radiology at Adhiparasakthi Hospitals, Melmaruvathur
paragraphs: Welcome to the cutting-edge Interventional Radiology department at Adhiparasakthi Hospitals, Melmaruvathur! Our expert team combines advanced imaging techniques with minimally invasive procedures to offer precise, effective treatments for a wide range of conditions. Discover how our state-of-the-art technology and specialized care can make a difference in your health journey.

sections.heading: Our Interventional Radiology Services
paragraphs: Angioplasty & Stenting: Open narrowed or blocked blood vessels to restore proper blood flow.
Biopsy Guidance: Use imaging to accurately guide biopsies for diagnostic purposes.
Uterine Fibroid Embolization: A non-surgical treatment to shrink fibroids and alleviate symptoms.
Varicose Vein Treatment: Minimally invasive techniques to treat and reduce varicose veins.
Dialysis Access: Creation and maintenance of vascular access for dialysis patients.
Tumor Ablation: Destroy tumors using radiofrequency or microwave energy.
Central Line Placement: Insertion of long-term intravenous catheters for medication delivery.
Biliary Interventions: Procedures to address bile duct obstructions and related issues.
Spinal Interventions: Treatments for spinal conditions, including vertebroplasty and kyphoplasty.

sections.heading: Why Choose Us?
paragraphs: Expert Team: Our radiologists are highly trained in the latest interventional techniques and technologies.
Advanced Technology: Equipped with the latest imaging and procedural technology for enhanced precision and outcomes.
Patient-Centered Care: Personalized treatment plans and compassionate care tailored to your needs.
Minimally Invasive: Many procedures are performed with minimal incisions, reducing recovery time and discomfort.
Comprehensive Services: From diagnosis to post-procedure care, all under one roof for your convenience.
Experience the future of medical care with our Interventional Radiology team.
Contact us today to learn more about how we can help you achieve optimal health through innovative, minimally invasive techniques.
